description: Manage ZenTao projects, bugs, and tasks (禅道项目管理). ZenTao is self-hosted, so a base_url parameter is required for each request. Authentication is handled via the 'zentao_token' secret injected by the host.

auth.instructions: 在禅道系统管理 > 二次开发 > 应用 中获取 Token，base_url 为你的禅道访问地址

required_secrets.name: zentao_token
required_secrets.prompt: ZenTao API token (from 系统管理 > 二次开发 > 应用)
